integer is initialized and false otherwise.\n    function isInitialized(euint8 v) internal pure returns (bool) {\n        return isInitialized(euint8.unwrap(v));\n    }\n\n    // Return true if the encrypted integer is initialized and false otherwise.\n    function isInitialized(euint16 v) internal pure returns (bool) {\n        return isInitialized(euint16.unwrap(v));\n    }\n\n    // Return true if the encrypted integer is initialized and false otherwise.\n    function isInitialized(euint32 v) internal pure returns (bool) {\n        return isInitialized(euint32.unwrap(v));\n    }\n\n    // Return true if the encrypted integer is initialized and false otherwise.\n    function isInitialized(euint64 v) internal pure returns (bool) {\n        return isInitialized(euint64.unwrap(v));\n    }\n\n    // Return true if the encrypted integer is initialized and false otherwise.\n    function isInitialized(euint128 v) internal pure returns (bool) {\n        return isInitialized(euint128.unwrap(v));\n    }\n\n\n    function isInitialized(eaddress v) internal pure returns (bool) {\n        return isInitialized(eaddress.unwrap(v));\n    }\n\n    function createUint256Inputs(bytes32 input1) internal pure returns (uint256[] memory) {\n        uint256[] memory inputs = new uint256[](1);\n        inputs[0] = uint256(input1);\n        return inputs;\n    }\n\n    function createUint256ExtraInputs(uint256 input1) internal pure returns (uint256[] memory) {\n        uint256[] memory inputs = new uint256[](1);\n        inputs[0] = uint256(input1);\n        return inputs;\n    }\n\n    function createUint256Inputs(bytes32 input1, bytes32 input2) internal pure returns (uint256[] memory) {\n        uint256[] memory inputs = new uint256[](2);\n        inputs[0] = uint256(input1);\n        inputs[1] = uint256(input2);\n        return inputs;\n    }\n\n    function createUint256Inputs(bytes32 input1, bytes32 input2, bytes32 input3) internal pure returns (uint256[] memory) {\n        uint256[] memory inputs = new uint256[](3);\n        inputs[0] = uint256(input1);\n        inputs[1] = uint256(input2);\n        inputs[2] = uint256(input3);\n        return inputs;\n    }\n\n    function createUint256ExtraInputs(uint256 input1, uint256 input2, uint256 input3) internal pure returns (uint256[] memory) {\n        uint256[] memory inputs = new uint256[](3);\n        inputs[0] = input1;\n        inputs[1] = input2;\n        inputs[2] = input3;\n        return inputs;\n    }\n}\n\nlibrary Impl {\n    function trivialEncrypt(uint256 value, uint8 toType, int32 securityZone) internal returns (bytes32) {\n        return bytes32(ITaskManager(TASK_MANAGER_ADDRESS).createTask(toType, FunctionId.trivialEncrypt, new uint256[](0), Common.createUint256ExtraInputs(value, toType, Common.convertInt32ToUint256(securityZone))));\n    }\n\n    function cast(bytes32 key, uint8 toType) internal returns (bytes32) {\n        return bytes32(ITaskManager(TASK_MANAGER_ADDRESS).createTask(toType, FunctionId.cast, Common.createUint256Inputs(key), Common.createUint256ExtraInputs(toType)));\n    }\n\n    function select(uint8 returnType, ebool control, bytes32 ifTrue, bytes32 ifFalse) internal returns (bytes32 result) {\n        return bytes32(ITaskManager(TASK_MANAGER_ADDRESS).createTask(returnType,\n            FunctionId.select,\n            Common.createUint256Inputs(ebool.unwrap(control), ifTrue, ifFalse),\n            new uint256[](0)));\n    }\n\n    function mathOp(uint8 returnType, bytes32 lhs, bytes32 rhs, FunctionId functionId) internal returns (bytes32) {\n        return bytes32(ITaskManager(TASK_MANAGER_ADDRESS).createTask(returnType, functionId, Common.createUint256Inputs(lhs, rhs), new uint256[](0)));\n    }\n\n    function getDecryptResult(bytes32 input) internal view returns (uint256) {\n        return ITaskManager(TASK_MANAGER_ADDRESS).getDecryptResult(uint256(input));\n    }\n\n    function getDecryptResultSafe(bytes32 input) internal view returns (uint256 result, bool decrypted) {\n        return ITaskManager(TASK_MANAGER_ADDRESS).getDecryptResultSafe(uint256(input));\n    }\n\n    function publishDecryptResult(bytes32 ctHash, uint256 result, bytes memory signature) internal {\n        ITaskManager(TASK_MANAGER_ADDRESS).publishDecryptResult(uint256(ctHash), result, signature);\n    }\n\n    function publishDecryptResultBatch(uint256[] memory ctHashes, uint256[] memory results, bytes[] memory signatures) internal {\n        ITaskManager(TASK_MANAGER_ADDRESS).publishDecryptResultBatch(ctHashes, results, signatures);\n    }\n\n    function publishDecryptResultBatch(bytes32[] memory ctHashes, uint256[] memory results, bytes[] memory signatures) internal {\n        uint256[] memory ctHashesUint = new uint256[](ctHashes.length);\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < ctHashes.length; i++) {\n            ctHashesUint[i] = uint256(ctHashes[i]);\n        }\n        publishDecryptResultBatch(ctHashesUint, results, signatures);\n    }\n\n    function verifyDecryptResult(bytes32 ctHash, uint256 result, bytes memory signature) internal view returns (bool) {\n        return ITaskManager(TASK_MANAGER_ADDRESS).verifyDecryptResult(uint256(ctHash), result, signature);\n    }\n\n    function verifyDecryptResultBatch(bytes32[] memory ctHashes, uint256[] memory results, bytes[] memory signatures) internal view returns (bool) {\n        uint256[] memory ctHashesUint = new uint256[](ctHashes.length);\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < ctHashes.length; i++) {\n            ctHashesUint[i] = uint256(ctHashes[i]);\n        }\n        return verifyDecryptResultBatch(ctHashesUint, results, signatures);\n    }\n\n    function verifyDecryptResultBatchSafe(uint256[] memory ctHashes, uint256[] memory results, bytes[] memory signatures) internal view returns (bool[] memory) {\n        return ITaskManager(TASK_MANAGER_ADDRESS).verifyDecryptResultBatchSafe(ctHashes, results, signatures);\n    }\n\n    function verifyDecryptResultBatchSafe(bytes32[] memory ctHashes, uint256[] memory results, bytes[] memory signatures) internal view returns (bool[] memory) {\n        uint256[] memory ctHashesUint = new uint256[](ctHashes.length);\n        for (uint256 i = 0; i < ctHashes.length; i++) {\n            ctHashesUint[i] = uint256(ctHashes[i]);\n        }\n        return verifyDecryptResultBatchSafe(ctHashesUint, results, signatures);\n    }\n\n    function not(uint8 returnType, bytes32 input) internal returns (bytes32) {\n        return SPDX-License-Identifier: UNLICENSED\npragma solidity >=0.8.25 <0.9.0;\n\nstruct EncryptedInput {\n    uint256 ctHash;\n    uint8 securityZone;\n    uint8 utype;\n    bytes signature;\n}\n\nstruct InEbool {\n    uint256 ctHash;\n    uint8 securityZone;\n    uint8 utype;\n    bytes signature;\n}\n\nstruct InEuint8 {\n    uint256 ctHash;\n    uint8 securityZone;\n    uint8 utype;\n    bytes signature;\n}\n\nstruct InEuint16 {\n    uint256 ctHash;\n    uint8 securityZone;\n    uint8 utype;\n    bytes signature;\n}\n\nstruct InEuint32 {\n    uint256 ctHash;\n    uint8 securityZone;\n    uint8 utype;\n    bytes signature;\n}\n\nstruct InEuint64 {\n    uint256 ctHash;\n    uint8 securityZone;\n    uint8 utype;\n    bytes signature;\n}\n\nstruct InEuint128 {\n    uint256 ctHash;\n    uint8 securityZone;\n    uint8 utype;\n    bytes signature;\n}\n\nstruct InEaddress {\n    uint256 ctHash;\n    uint8 securityZone;\n    uint8 utype;\n    bytes signature;\n}\n\n\n// Order is set as in fheos/precompiles/types/types.go\nenum FunctionId {\n    _0,             // 0 - GetNetworkKey\n    _1,             // 1 - Verify\n    cast,           // 2\n    sealoutput,     // 3\n    select,         // 4 - select\n    _5,             // 5 - req\n    decrypt,        // 6\n    sub,            // 7\n    add,            // 8\n    xor,            // 9\n    and,            // 10\n    or,             // 11\n    not,            // 12\n    div,            // 13\n    rem,            // 14\n    mul,            // 15\n    shl,            // 16\n    shr,            // 17\n    gte,            // 18\n    lte,            // 19\n    lt,             // 20\n    gt,             // 21\n    min,            // 22\n    max,            // 23\n    eq,             // 24\n    ne,             // 25\n    trivialEncrypt, // 26\n    random,         // 27\n    rol,            // 28\n    ror,            // 29\n    square,         // 30\n    _31             // 31\n}\n\ninterface ITaskManager {\n    function createTask(uint8 returnType, FunctionId funcId, uint256[] memory encryptedInputs, uint256[] memory extraInputs) external returns (uint256);\n    function createRandomTask(uint8 returnType, uint256 seed, int32 securityZone) external returns (uint256);\n\n    function createDecryptTask(uint256 ctHash, address requestor) external;\n    function verifyInput(EncryptedInput memory input, address sender) external returns (uint256);\n\n    function allow(uint256 ctHash, address account) external;\n    function isAllowed(uint256 ctHash, address account) external returns (bool);\n    function isPubliclyAllowed(uint256 ctHash) external view returns (bool);\n    function allowGlobal(uint256 ctHash) external;\n    function allowTransient(uint256 ctHash, address account) external;\n    function getDecryptResultSafe(uint256 ctHash) external view returns (uint256, bool);\n    function getDecryptResult(uint256 ctHash) external view returns (uint256);\n\n    function publishDecryptResult(uint256 ctHash, uint256 result, bytes calldata signature) external;\n    function publishDecryptResultBatch(uint256[] calldata ctHashes, uint256[] calldata results, bytes[] calldata signatures) external;\n    function verifyDecryptResult(uint256 ctHash, uint256 result, bytes calldata signature) external view returns (bool);\n    function verifyDecryptResultSafe(\n        uint256 ctHash,\n        uint256 result,\n        bytes calldata signature\n    ) external view returns (bool);\n    function verifyDecryptResultBatch(uint256[] calldata ctHashes, uint256[] calldata results, bytes[] calldata signatures) external view returns (bool);\n    function verifyDecryptResultBatchSafe(uint256[] calldata ctHashes, uint256[] calldata results, bytes[] calldata signatures) external view returns (bool[] memory);\n}\n\nlibrary Utils {\n    error InvalidEncryptedInput(uint8 got, uint8 expected);\n\n    // Values used to communicate types to the runtime.\n    // Must match values defined in warp-drive protobufs for everything to\n    uint8 internal constant EUINT8_TFHE = 2;\n    uint8 internal constant EUINT16_TFHE = 3;\n    uint8 internal constant EUINT32_TFHE = 4;\n    uint8 internal constant EUINT64_TFHE = 5;\n    uint8 internal constant EUINT128_TFHE = 6;\n    uint8 internal constant EUINT256_TFHE = 8;\n    uint8 internal constant EADDRESS_TFHE = 7;\n    uint8 internal constant EBOOL_TFHE = 0;\n\n    function functionIdToString(FunctionId _functionId) internal pure returns (string memory) {\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.cast) return \"cast\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.sealoutput) return \"sealOutput\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.select) return \"select\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.decrypt) return \"decrypt\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.sub) return \"sub\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.add) return \"add\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.xor) return \"xor\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.and) return \"and\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.or) return \"or\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.not) return \"not\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.div) return \"div\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.rem) return \"rem\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.mul) return \"mul\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.shl) return \"shl\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.shr) return \"shr\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.gte) return \"gte\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.lte) return \"lte\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.lt) return \"lt\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.gt) return \"gt\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.min) return \"min\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.max) return \"max\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.eq) return \"eq\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.ne) return \"ne\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.trivialEncrypt) return \"trivialEncrypt\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.random) return \"random\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.rol) return \"rol\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.ror) return \"ror\";\n        if (_functionId == FunctionId.square) return \"square\";\n\n        return \"\";\n    }\n\n    function inputFromEbool(InEbool memory input) internal pure returns (EncryptedInput memory) {\n        return EncryptedInput({\n            ctHash: input.ctHash,\n            securityZone: input.securityZone,\n            utype: EBOOL_TFHE,\n            signature: input.signature\n        });\n    }\n\n    function inputFromEuint8(InEuint8 memory input) internal pure returns (EncryptedInput memory) {\n        return EncryptedInput({\n            ctHash: input.ctHash,\n            securityZone: input.securityZone,\n            utype: EUINT8_TFHE,\n            signature: input.signature\n        });\n    }\n\n    function inputFromEuint16(InEuint16 memory input) internal pure returns (EncryptedInput memory) {\n        return EncryptedInput({\n            ctHash: input.ctHash,\n            securityZone: input.securityZone,\n            utype: EUINT16_TFHE,\n            signature: input.signature\n        });\n    }\n\n    function inputFromEuint32(InEuint32 memory input) internal pure returns (EncryptedInput memory) {\n        return EncryptedInput({\n            ctHash: input.ctHash,\n            securityZone: input.securityZone,\n            utype: EUINT32_TFHE,\n            signature: input.signature\n        });\n    }\n\n    function inputFromEuint64(InEuint64 memory input) internal pure returns (EncryptedInput memory) {\n        return EncryptedInput({\n            ctHash: input.ctHash,\n            securityZone: input.securityZone,\n            utype: EUINT64_TFHE,\n            signature: input.signature\n        });\n    }\n\n    function inputFromEuint128(InEuint128 memory input) internal pure returns (EncryptedInput memory) {\n        return EncryptedInput({\n            ctHash: input.ctHash,\n            securityZone: input.securityZone,\n            utype: EUINT128_TFHE,\n            signature: input.signature\n        });\n    }\n\n    function inputFromEaddress(InEaddress memory input) internal pure returns (EncryptedInput memory) {\n        return EncryptedInput({\n            ctHash: input.ctHash,\n            securityZone: input.securityZone,\n            utype: EADDRESS_TFHE,\n            signature: input.signature\n        });\n    }\n\n    function inputFromBytes(bytes memory data, uint8 expected) internal pure returns (EncryptedInput memory) {\n        EncryptedInput memory v;\n        (\n            v.ctHash,\n            v.securityZone,\n            v.utype,\n            v.signature\n        ) = abi.decode(\n            data,\n            (uint256, uint8, uint8, bytes)\n        );\n\n        expectUtype(v.utype, expected);\n        return v;\n    }\n\n    function inputFromHashAndProof(bytes32 hash, bytes memory signature, uint8 utype) internal pure returns (EncryptedInput memory) {\n        return EncryptedInput({\n            ctHash: uint256(hash),\n            securityZone: 0,\n            utype: utype,\n            signature: signature\n        });\n    }\n\n    function expectUtype(uint8 actual, uint8 expected) internal pure {\n        if (actual != expected) {\n            revert InvalidEncryptedInput(actual, expected);\n        }\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0x3598b6a3a706a097e0fd135b536a0134e26a05ae18f4648974e9b1e8473255c4","license":"UNLICENSED"},"@openzeppelin/contracts/access/Ownable.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: ^0.8.25;\n\nimport { FHE, euint64, InEuint64 } from \"@fhenixprotocol/cofhe-contracts/FHE.sol\";\nimport { ERC7984 } from \"fhenix-confidential-contracts/contracts/ERC7984/ERC7984.sol\";\nimport { Ownable } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/access/Ownable.sol\";\n\ncontract MockERC7984Token is ERC7984, Ownable {\n    constructor(\n        string memory name_,\n        string memory symbol_,\n        uint8 decimals_\n    ) ERC7984(name_, symbol_, decimals_, \"\") Ownable(msg.sender) {}\n\n    function confidentialMint(address to, InEuint64 memory amount) external returns (euint64) {\n        euint64 encAmount = FHE.asEuint64(amount);\n        FHE.allowThis(encAmount);\n        return _mint(to, encAmount);\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0x698f556561fdb44d6f6ed22cb3bbd6454f56b913fd6b91d60ca121fdbd6d19b2","license":"MIT"},"fhenix-confidential-contracts/contracts/ERC7984/ERC7984.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\npragma solidity ^0.8.25;\n\nimport { FHE, euint64, InEuint64, ebool } from \"@fhenixprotocol/cofhe-contracts/FHE.sol\";\n\nimport { IERC20 } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/IERC20.sol\";\nimport { Context } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/Context.sol\";\nimport { ERC165 } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/introspection/ERC165.sol\";\nimport { IERC7984 } from \"../interfaces/IERC7984.sol\";\nimport { FHESafeMath } from \"../utils/FHESafeMath.sol\";\nimport { ERC7984Utils } from \"./utils/ERC7984Utils.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @dev Reference implementation for {IERC7984}.\n *\n * This contract implements a fungible token where balances and transfers are encrypted using the Fhenix CoFHE coprocessor,\n * providing confidentiality to users. Token amounts are stored as encrypted, unsigned integers (`euint64`)\n * that can only be decrypted by authorized parties.\n *\n * Key features:\n *\n * - All balances are encrypted\n * - Transfers happen without revealing amounts\n * - Support for operators (delegated transfer capabilities with time bounds)\n * - Safe overflow/underflow handling for FHE operations\n *\n * ERC-20 Compatibility:\n *\n * This contract implements the {IERC20} interface for backwards compatibility with wallets, block explorers,\n * and other ERC-20 tooling. The {balanceOf} and {totalSupply} functions return **indicator values** (not real\n * balances). The indicator starts at `7984.0000` on first interaction and shifts by `0.0001` per transfer,\n * signalling that this is a confidential token. ERC-20 mutative functions (`transfer`, `transferFrom`,\n * `approve`) revert unconditionally.\n */\nabstract contract ERC7984 is IERC7984, Context, ERC165 {\n    mapping(address account => euint64) private _balances;\n    mapping(address account => mapping(address spender => uint48)) internal _operators;\n    euint64 private _totalSupply;\n    string private _name;\n    string private _symbol;\n    uint8 private _decimals;\n    string private _contractURI;\n\n    // ERC-20 indicator state \u2014 see contract-level docs above.\n    mapping(address account => uint32) private _indicatedBalances;\n    uint32 private _indicatedTotalSupply;\n    uint256 private _indicatorTick;\n\n    uint32 private constant _INDICATOR_BASE = 79_840_000;\n    uint32 private constant _INDICATOR_TRANSFER = 79_840_001;\n\n    /// @dev Emitted when an encrypted amount `encryptedAmount` is requested for disclosure by `requester`.\n    event AmountDiscloseRequested(euint64 indexed encryptedAmount, address indexed requester);\n\n    /// @dev The given receiver `receiver` is invalid for transfers.\n    error ERC7984InvalidReceiver(address receiver);\n\n    /// @dev The given sender `sender` is invalid for transfers.\n    error ERC7984InvalidSender(address sender);\n\n    /// @dev The given holder `holder` is not authorized to spend on behalf of `spender`.\n    error ERC7984UnauthorizedSpender(address holder, address spender);\n\n    /// @dev The holder `holder` is trying to send tokens but has a balance of 0.\n    error ERC7984ZeroBalance(address holder);\n\n    /**\n     * @dev The caller `user` does not have access to the encrypted amount `amount`.\n     *\n     * NOTE: Try using the equivalent transfer function with an input proof.\n     */\n    error ERC7984UnauthorizedUseOfEncryptedAmount(euint64 amount, address user);\n\n    /// @dev The given caller `caller` is not authorized for the current operation.\n    error ERC7984UnauthorizedCaller(address caller);\n\n    /// @dev Reverts when a cleartext ERC-20 function is called on a confidential token.\n    error ERC7984IncompatibleFunction();\n\n    constructor(string memory name_, string memory symbol_, uint8 decimals_, string memory contractURI_) {\n        _name = name_;\n        _symbol = symbol_;\n        _decimals = decimals_;\n        _contractURI = contractURI_;\n        _indicatorTick = decimals_ <= 4 ? 1 : 10 ** (decimals_ - 4);\n    }\n\n    // =========================================================================\n    //  ERC-165\n    // =========================================================================\n\n    /// @inheritdoc ERC165\n    function supportsInterface(bytes4 interfaceId) public view virtual override(ERC165) returns (bool) {\n        return\n            interfaceId == type(IERC7984).interfaceId ||\n            interfaceId == type(IERC20).interfaceId ||\n            super.supportsInterface(interfaceId);\n    }\n\n    // =========================================================================\n    //  ERC-20 indicator (backwards-compatible view layer)\n    // =========================================================================\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Returns an indicator of the underlying encrypted total supply. The value is **not** the\n     * real total supply \u2014 it is a counter that starts at `7984.0000` on first mint and shifts by\n     * `0.0001` per mint/burn.\n     */\n    function totalSupply() public view virtual returns (uint256) {\n        return uint256(_indicatedTotalSupply) * _indicatorTick;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Returns an indicator of the underlying encrypted balance. The value is **not** the real\n     * balance \u2014 it is a counter that starts at `7984.0001` on first interaction and shifts by\n     * `0.0001` per send/receive. A return value of `0` means the account has never interacted.\n     */\n    function balanceOf(address account) public view virtual returns (uint256) {\n        return uint256(_indicatedBalances[account]) * _indicatorTick;\n    }\n\n    /// @dev Always reverts. Use {confidentialTransfer} instead.\n    function transfer(address, uint256) public pure returns (bool) {\n        revert ERC7984IncompatibleFunction();\n    }\n\n    /// @dev Always reverts. Use {confidentialTransferFrom} instead.\n    function transferFrom(address, address, uint256) public pure returns (bool) {\n        revert ERC7984IncompatibleFunction();\n    }\n\n    /// @dev Always reverts. Use {setOperator} instead.\n    function approve(address, uint256) public pure returns (bool) {\n        revert ERC7984IncompatibleFunction();\n    }\n\n    /// @dev Always reverts. Allowances are replaced by time-bound operators.\n    function allowance(address, address) public pure returns (uint256) {\n        revert ERC7984IncompatibleFunction();\n    }\n\n    /// @dev Returns `true`, signalling that {balanceOf} returns an indicator, not a real balance.\n    function balanceOfIsIndicator() public pure virtual returns (bool) {\n        return true;\n    }\n\n    /// @dev Returns the raw unit size of a single indicator tick (scales with {decimals}).\n    function indicatorTick() public view returns (uint256) {\n        return _indicatorTick;\n    }\n\n    /// @dev Resets the caller's indicated balance to `0` (no interaction).\n    function resetIndicatedBalance() external {\n        _indicatedBalances[msg.sender] = 0;\n    }\n\n    // =========================================================================\n    //  IERC7984 view functions\n    // =========================================================================\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IERC7984\n    function name() public view virtual returns (string memory) {\n        return _name;\n    }\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IERC7984\n    function symbol() public view virtual returns (string memory) {\n        return _symbol;\n    }\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IERC7984\n    function decimals() public view virtual returns (uint8) {\n        return _decimals;\n    }\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IERC7984\n    function contractURI() public view virtual returns (string memory) {\n        return _contractURI;\n    }\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IERC7984\n    function confidentialTotalSupply() public view virtual returns (euint64) {\n        return _totalSupply;\n    }\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IERC7984\n    function confidentialBalanceOf(address account) public view virtual returns (euint64) {\n        return _balances[account];\n    }\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IERC7984\n    function isOperator(address holder, address spender) public view virtual returns (bool) {\n        return holder == spender || block.timestamp <= _operators[holder][spender];\n    }\n\n    // =========================================================================\n    //  IERC7984 mutative functions\n    // =========================================================================\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IERC7984\n    function setOperator(address operator, uint48 until) public virtual {\n        _setOperator(msg.sender, operator, until);\n    }\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IERC7984\n    function confidentialTransfer(address to, InEuint64 memory encryptedAmount) public virtual returns (euint64) {\n        return _transfer(msg.sender, to, FHE.asEuint64(encryptedAmount));\n    }\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IERC7984\n    function confidentialTransfer(address to, euint64 amount) public virtual returns (euint64) {\n        if (!FHE.isAllowed(amount, msg.sender)) revert ERC7984UnauthorizedUseOfEncryptedAmount(amount, msg.sender);\n        return _transfer(msg.sender, to, amount);\n    }\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IERC7984\n    function confidentialTransferFrom(\n        address from,\n        address to,\n        InEuint64 memory encryptedAmount\n    ) public virtual returns (euint64 transferred) {\n        if (!isOperator(from, msg.sender)) revert ERC7984UnauthorizedSpender(from, msg.sender);\n        transferred = _transfer(from, to, FHE.asEuint64(encryptedAmount));\n        FHE.allowTransient(transferred, msg.sender);\n    }\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IERC7984\n    function confidentialTransferFrom(\n        address from,\n        address to,\n        euint64 amount\n    ) public virtual returns (euint64 transferred) {\n        if (!FHE.isAllowed(amount, msg.sender)) revert ERC7984UnauthorizedUseOfEncryptedAmount(amount, msg.sender);\n        if (!isOperator(from, msg.sender)) revert ERC7984UnauthorizedSpender(from, msg.sender);\n        transferred = _transfer(from, to, amount);\n        FHE.allowTransient(transferred, msg.sender);\n    }\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IERC7984\n    function confidentialTransferAndCall(\n        address to,\n        InEuint64 memory encryptedAmount,\n        bytes calldata data\n    ) public virtual returns (euint64 transferred) {\n        transferred = _transferAndCall(msg.sender, to, FHE.asEuint64(encryptedAmount), data);\n        FHE.allowTransient(transferred, msg.sender);\n    }\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IERC7984\n    function confidentialTransferAndCall(\n        address to,\n        euint64 amount,\n        bytes calldata data\n    ) public virtual returns (euint64 transferred) {\n        if (!FHE.isAllowed(amount, msg.sender)) revert ERC7984UnauthorizedUseOfEncryptedAmount(amount, msg.sender);\n        transferred = _transferAndCall(msg.sender, to, amount, data);\n        FHE.allowTransient(transferred, msg.sender);\n    }\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IERC7984\n    function confidentialTransferFromAndCall(\n        address from,\n        address to,\n        InEuint64 memory encryptedAmount,\n        bytes calldata data\n    ) public virtual returns (euint64 transferred) {\n        if (!isOperator(from, msg.sender)) revert ERC7984UnauthorizedSpender(from, msg.sender);\n        transferred = _transferAndCall(from, to, FHE.asEuint64(encryptedAmount), data);\n        FHE.allowTransient(transferred, msg.sender);\n    }\n\n    /// @inheritdoc IERC7984\n    function confidentialTransferFromAndCall(\n        address from,\n        address to,\n        euint64 amount,\n        bytes calldata data\n    ) public virtual returns (euint64 transferred) {\n        if (!FHE.isAllowed(amount, msg.sender)) revert ERC7984UnauthorizedUseOfEncryptedAmount(amount, msg.sender);\n        if (!isOperator(from, msg.sender)) revert ERC7984UnauthorizedSpender(from, msg.sender);\n        transferred = _transferAndCall(from, to, amount, data);\n        FHE.allowTransient(transferred, msg.sender);\n    }\n\n    // =========================================================================\n    //  Disclosure\n    // =========================================================================\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Starts the process to disclose an encrypted amount `encryptedAmount` publicly by making it\n     * publicly decryptable. Emits the {AmountDiscloseRequested} event.\n     *\n     * NOTE: Both `msg.sender` and `address(this)` must have permission to access the encrypted amount\n     * `encryptedAmount` to request disclosure of the encrypted amount `encryptedAmount`.\n     */\n    function requestDiscloseEncryptedAmount(euint64 encryptedAmount) public virtual {\n        if (!FHE.isAllowed(encryptedAmount, msg.sender))\n            revert ERC7984UnauthorizedUseOfEncryptedAmount(encryptedAmount, msg.sender);\n\n        FHE.allowPublic(encryptedAmount);\n        emit AmountDiscloseRequested(encryptedAmount, msg.sender);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Publicly discloses an encrypted value with a given decryption proof. Emits the {AmountDisclosed} event.\n     *\n     * NOTE: May not be tied to a prior request via {requestDiscloseEncryptedAmount}.\n     */\n    function discloseEncryptedAmount(\n        euint64 encryptedAmount,\n        uint64 cleartextAmount,\n        bytes calldata decryptionProof\n    ) public virtual {\n        FHE.verifyDecryptResult(encryptedAmount, cleartextAmount, decryptionProof);\n        emit AmountDisclosed(encryptedAmount, cleartextAmount);\n    }\n\n    // =========================================================================\n    //  Internal helpers\n    // =========================================================================\n\n    function _setOperator(address holder, address operator, uint48 until) internal virtual {\n        _operators[holder][operator] = until;\n        emit OperatorSet(holder, operator, until);\n    }\n\n    function _mint(address to, euint64 amount) internal returns (euint64 transferred) {\n        if (to == address(0)) revert ERC7984InvalidReceiver(address(0));\n        return _update(address(0), to, amount);\n    }\n\n    function _burn(address from, euint64 amount) internal returns (euint64 transferred) {\n        if (from == address(0)) revert ERC7984InvalidSender(address(0));\n        return _update(from, address(0), amount);\n    }\n\n    function _transfer(address from, address to, euint64 amount) internal returns (euint64 transferred) {\n        if (from == address(0)) revert ERC7984InvalidSender(address(0));\n        if (to == address(0)) revert ERC7984InvalidReceiver(address(0));\n        return _update(from, to, amount);\n    }\n\n    function _transferAndCall(\n        address from,\n        address to,\n        euint64 amount,\n        bytes calldata data\n    ) internal returns (euint64 transferred) {\n        euint64 sent = _transfer(from, to, amount);\n\n        ebool success = ERC7984Utils.checkOnTransferReceived(msg.sender, from, to, sent, data);\n\n        euint64 refund = _update(to, from, FHE.select(success, FHE.asEuint64(0), sent));\n        transferred = FHE.sub(sent, refund);\n    }\n\n    function _incrementIndicator(uint32 current) internal pure returns (uint32) {\n        if (current == 0) return _INDICATOR_BASE + 1;\n        return current + 1;\n    }\n\n    function _decrementIndicator(uint32 current) internal pure returns (uint32) {\n        if (current == 0) return _INDICATOR_BASE;\n        return current - 1;\n    }\n\n    function _update(address from, address to, euint64 amount) internal virtual returns (euint64 transferred) {\n        ebool success;\n        euint64 ptr;\n\n        if (from == address(0)) {\n            (success, ptr) = FHESafeMath.tryIncrease(_totalSupply, amount);\n            FHE.allowThis(ptr);\n            _totalSupply = ptr;\n            _indicatedTotalSupply = _incrementIndicator(_indicatedTotalSupply);\n        } else {\n            euint64 fromBalance = _balances[from];\n            if (!FHE.isInitialized(fromBalance)) revert ERC7984ZeroBalance(from);\n            (success, ptr) = FHESafeMath.tryDecrease(fromBalance, amount);\n            FHE.allowThis(ptr);\n            FHE.allow(ptr, from);\n            _balances[from] = ptr;\n            _indicatedBalances[from] = _decrementIndicator(_indicatedBalances[from]);\n        }\n\n        transferred = FHE.select(success, amount, FHE.asEuint64(0));\n\n        if (to == address(0)) {\n            ptr = FHE.sub(_totalSupply, transferred);\n            FHE.allowThis(ptr);\n            _totalSupply = ptr;\n            _indicatedTotalSupply = _decrementIndicator(_indicatedTotalSupply);\n        } else {\n            ptr = FHE.add(_balances[to], transferred);\n            FHE.allowThis(ptr);\n            FHE.allow(ptr, to);\n            _balances[to] = ptr;\n            _indicatedBalances[to] = _incrementIndicator(_indicatedBalances[to]);\n        }\n\n        if (from != address(0)) FHE.allow(transferred, from);\n        if (to != address(0)) FHE.allow(transferred, to);\n        FHE.allowThis(transferred);\n\n        emit Transfer(from, to, uint256(_INDICATOR_TRANSFER) * _indicatorTick);\n        emit ConfidentialTransfer(from, to, transferred);\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0x99132b9146e9dec7589eb10ecd71025dadefc799be489d014f34eb62b03e244c","license":"MIT"},"fhenix-confidential-contracts/contracts/ERC7984/utils/ERC7984Utils.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\npragma solidity ^0.8.25;\n\nimport { FHE, ebool, euint64 } from \"@fhenixprotocol/cofhe-contracts/FHE.sol\";\n\nimport { IERC7984Receiver } from \"../../interfaces/IERC7984Receiver.sol\";\nimport { ERC7984 } from \"../ERC7984.sol\";\n\n/// @dev Library that provides common {ERC7984} utility functions.\nlibrary ERC7984Utils {\n    /**\n     * @dev Performs a transfer callback to the recipient of the transfer `to`. Should be invoked\n     * after all transfers \"withCallback\" on a {ERC7984}.\n     *\n     * The transfer callback is not invoked on the recipient if the recipient has no code (i.e. is an EOA). If the\n     * recipient has non-zero code, it must implement\n     * {IERC7984Receiver-onConfidentialTransferReceived} and return an `ebool` indicating\n     * whether the transfer was accepted or not. If the `ebool` is `false`, the transfer function\n     * should try to refund the `from` address.\n     */\n    function checkOnTransferReceived(\n        address operator,\n        address from,\n        address to,\n        euint64 amount,\n        bytes calldata data\n    ) internal returns (ebool) {\n        if (to.code.length > 0) {\n            try IERC7984Receiver(to).onConfidentialTransferReceived(operator, from, amount, data) returns (\n                ebool retval\n            ) {\n                return retval;\n            } catch (bytes memory reason) {\n                if (reason.length == 0) {\n                    revert ERC7984.ERC7984InvalidReceiver(to);\n                } else {\n                    assembly (\"memory-safe\") {\n                        revert(add(32, reason), mload(reason))\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        } else {\n            return FHE.asEbool(true);\n        }\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0x95829735866dbe2be955686020ae9c754d1efb7823704bb940f31d3b5d4f74c6","license":"MIT"},"fhenix-confidential-contracts/contracts/interfaces/IERC7984.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\npragma solidity ^0.8.25;\n\nimport { euint64, InEuint64 } from \"@fhenixprotocol/cofhe-contracts/FHE.sol\";\nimport { IERC20 } from \"@openzeppelin/contracts/token/ERC20/IERC20.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @dev Interface for a confidential fungible token standard utilizing the Fhenix FHE library.\n *\n * Extends {IERC20} for backwards compatibility with wallets and block explorers. The ERC-20\n * view functions ({balanceOf}, {totalSupply}) return **indicator values** rather than real\n * balances, and the mutative functions ({transfer}, {transferFrom}, {approve}) revert.\n */\ninterface IERC7984 is IERC20 {\n    /**\n     * @dev Emitted when the expiration timestamp for an operator `operator` is updated for a given `holder`.\n     * The operator may move any amount of tokens on behalf of the holder until the timestamp `until`.\n     */\n    event OperatorSet(address indexed holder, address indexed operator, uint48 until);\n\n    /// @dev Emitted when a confidential transfer is made from `from` to `to` of encrypted amount `amount`.\n    event ConfidentialTransfer(address indexed from, address indexed to, euint64 indexed amount);\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Emitted when an encrypted amount is disclosed.\n     *\n     * Accounts with access to the encrypted amount `encryptedAmount` that is also accessible to this contract\n     * should be able to disclose the amount. This functionality is implementation specific.\n     */\n    event AmountDisclosed(euint64 indexed encryptedAmount, uint64 amount);\n\n    /// @dev Returns the name of the token.\n    function name() external view returns (string memory);\n\n    /// @dev Returns the symbol of the token.\n    function symbol() external view returns (string memory);\n\n    /// @dev Returns the number of decimals of the token. Recommended to be 6.\n    function decimals() external view returns (uint8);\n\n    /// @dev Returns the contract URI. See https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7572[ERC-7572] for details.\n    function contractURI() external view returns (string memory);\n\n    /// @dev Returns the confidential total supply of the token.\n    function confidentialTotalSupply() external view returns (euint64);\n\n    /// @dev Returns the confidential balance of the account `account`.\n    function confidentialBalanceOf(address account) external view returns (euint64);\n\n    /// @dev Returns `true`, signalling that {balanceOf} returns an indicator, not a real balance.\n    function balanceOfIsIndicator() external view returns (bool);\n\n    /// @dev Returns the raw unit size of a single indicator tick (scales with {decimals}).\n    function indicatorTick() external view returns (uint256);\n\n    /// @dev Returns true if `spender` is currently an operator for `holder`.\n    function isOperator(address holder, address spender) external view returns (bool);\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Sets `operator` as an operator for `holder` until the timestamp `until`.\n     *\n     * NOTE: An operator may transfer any amount of tokens on behalf of a holder while approved.\n     */\n    function setOperator(address operator, uint48 until) external;\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Transfers the encrypted amount `encryptedAmount` to `to`.\n     *\n     * Returns the encrypted amount that was actually transferred.\n     */\n    function confidentialTransfer(address to, InEuint64 memory encryptedAmount) external returns (euint64);\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Similar to {confidentialTransfer-address-InEuint64} but without an input proof.\n     *  The caller *must* already be allowed by ACL for the given `amount`.\n     */\n    function confidentialTransfer(address to, euint64 amount) external returns (euint64 transferred);\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Transfers the encrypted amount `encryptedAmount` from `from` to `to`.\n     * `msg.sender` must be either `from` or an operator for `from`.\n     *\n     * Returns the encrypted amount that was actually transferred.\n     */\n    function confidentialTransferFrom(\n        address from,\n        address to,\n        InEuint64 memory encryptedAmount\n    ) external returns (euint64);\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Similar to {confidentialTransferFrom-address-address-InEuint64} but without an input proof.\n     * The caller *must* be already allowed by ACL for the given `amount`.\n     */\n    function confidentialTransferFrom(address from, address to, euint64 amount) external returns (euint64 transferred);\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Similar to {confidentialTransfer-address-InEuint64} but with a callback to `to` after\n     * the transfer.\n     *\n     * The callback is made to the {IERC7984Receiver-onConfidentialTransferReceived} function on the\n     * to address with the actual transferred amount (may differ from the given `encryptedAmount`) and the given\n     * data `data`.\n     */\n    function confidentialTransferAndCall(\n        address to,\n        InEuint64 memory encryptedAmount,\n        bytes calldata data\n    ) external returns (euint64 transferred);\n\n    /// @dev Similar to {confidentialTransfer-address-euint64} but with a callback to `to` after the transfer.\n    function confidentialTransferAndCall(\n        address to,\n        euint64 amount,\n        bytes calldata data\n    ) external returns (euint64 transferred);\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Similar to {confidentialTransferFrom-address-address-InEuint64} but with a callback to `to`\n     * after the transfer.\n     */\n    function confidentialTransferFromAndCall(\n        address from,\n        address to,\n        InEuint64 memory encryptedAmount,\n        bytes calldata data\n    ) external returns (euint64 transferred);\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Similar to {confidentialTransferFrom-address-address-euint64} but with a callback to `to`\n     * after the transfer.\n     *\n     */\n    function confidentialTransferFromAndCall(\n        address from,\n        address to,\n        euint64 amount,\n        bytes calldata data\n    ) external returns (euint64 transferred);\n}\n","keccak256":"0xeccb1b1d35bdd7947fa03e0864c84a08fd660c27b11c7a809c1846655576ee07","license":"MIT"},"fhenix-confidential-contracts/contracts/interfaces/IERC7984Receiver.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\npragma solidity ^0.8.25;\n\nimport {ebool, euint64} from \"@fhenixprotocol/cofhe-contracts/FHE.sol\";\n\n/// @dev Interface for contracts that can receive ERC7984 transfers with a callback.\ninterface IERC7984Receiver {\n    /**\n     * @dev Called upon receiving a confidential token transfer. Returns an encrypted boolean indicating success\n     * of the callback. If false is returned, the token contract will attempt to refund the transfer.\n     *\n     * WARNING: Do not manually refund the transfer AND return false, as this can lead to double refunds.\n     */\n    function onConfidentialTransferReceived(\n        address operator,\n        address from,\n        euint64 amount,\n        bytes calldata data\n    ) external returns (ebool);\n}","keccak256":"0x1509adb143f3d29bf19943a07de3def9763b4189358f7dfad776097a178b038e","license":"MIT"},"fhenix-confidential-contracts/contracts/utils/FHESafeMath.sol":{"content":"// SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT\npragma solidity ^0.8.25;\n\nimport { FHE, ebool, euint64 } from \"@fhenixprotocol/cofhe-contracts/FHE.sol\";\n\n/**\n * @dev Library providing safe arithmetic operations for encrypted values\n * to handle potential overflows in FHE operations.\n *\n * NOTE: An uninitialized `euint64` value is evaluated as 0.\n * This library may return an uninitialized value if all inputs are uninitialized.\n */\nlibrary FHESafeMath {\n    /**\n     * @dev Try to increase the encrypted value `oldValue` by `delta`. If the operation is successful,\n     * `success` will be true and `updated` will be the new value. Otherwise, `success` will be false\n     * and `updated` will be the original value.\n     */\n    function tryIncrease(euint64 oldValue, euint64 delta) internal returns (ebool success, euint64 updated) {\n        if (!FHE.isInitialized(oldValue)) {\n            return (FHE.asEbool(true), delta);\n        }\n        euint64 newValue = FHE.add(oldValue, delta);\n        success = FHE.gte(newValue, oldValue);\n        updated = FHE.select(success, newValue, oldValue);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Try to decrease the encrypted value `oldValue` by `delta`. If the operation is successful,\n     * `success` will be true and `updated` will be the new value. Otherwise, `success` will be false\n     * and `updated` will be the original value.\n     */\n    function tryDecrease(euint64 oldValue, euint64 delta) internal returns (ebool success, euint64 updated) {\n        if (!FHE.isInitialized(oldValue)) {\n            if (!FHE.isInitialized(delta)) {\n                return (FHE.asEbool(true), oldValue);\n            }\n            return (FHE.eq(delta, FHE.asEuint64(0)), FHE.asEuint64(0));\n        }\n        success = FHE.gte(oldValue, delta);\n        updated = FHE.select(success, FHE.sub(oldValue, delta), oldValue);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Try to add `a` and `b`. If the operation is successful, `success` will be true and `res`\n     * will be the sum of `a` and `b`. Otherwise, `success` will be false, and `res` will be 0.\n     */\n    function tryAdd(euint64 a, euint64 b) internal returns (ebool success, euint64 res) {\n        if (!FHE.isInitialized(a)) {\n            return (FHE.asEbool(true), b);\n        }\n        if (!FHE.isInitialized(b)) {\n            return (FHE.asEbool(true), a);\n        }\n\n        euint64 sum = FHE.add(a, b);\n        success = FHE.gte(sum, a);\n        res = FHE.select(success, sum, FHE.asEuint64(0));\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * @dev Try to subtract `b` from `a`. If the operation is successful, `success` will be true and `res`\n     * will be `a - b`. Otherwise, `success` will be false, and `res` will be 0.\n     */\n    function trySub(euint64 a, euint64 b) internal returns (ebool success, euint64 res) {\n        if (!FHE.isInitialized(b)) {\n            return (FHE.asEbool(true), a);\n        }\n\n        euint64 difference = FHE.sub(a, b);\n        success = FHE.lte(difference, a);\n        res = FHE.select(success, difference, FHE.asEuint64(0));\n    }\n}\n","keccak256":"0x0b2b9ca057c02fc075e272851fa381fc28e10dab85b6d0d9d006b9b49e5f754b","license":"MIT"}},"version":1}

ERC7984IncompatibleFunction().details: Reverts when a cleartext ERC-20 function is called on a confidential token.

ERC7984InvalidReceiver(address).details: The given receiver `receiver` is invalid for transfers.

ERC7984InvalidSender(address).details: The given sender `sender` is invalid for transfers.

ERC7984UnauthorizedCaller(address).details: The given caller `caller` is not authorized for the current operation.

ERC7984UnauthorizedSpender(address,addre.details: The given holder `holder` is not authorized to spend on behalf of `spender`.

ERC7984UnauthorizedUseOfEncryptedAmount(.details: The caller `user` does not have access to the encrypted amount `amount`. NOTE: Try using the equivalent transfer function with an input proof.

ERC7984ZeroBalance(address).details: The holder `holder` is trying to send tokens but has a balance of 0.

OwnableInvalidOwner(address).details: The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)

OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address).details: The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation.

AmountDiscloseRequested(bytes32,address).details: Emitted when an encrypted amount `encryptedAmount` is requested for disclosure by `requester`.

AmountDisclosed(bytes32,uint64).details: Emitted when an encrypted amount is disclosed. Accounts with access to the encrypted amount `encryptedAmount` that is also accessible to this contract should be able to disclose the amount. This functionality is implementation specific.

Approval(address,address,uint256).details: Emitted when the allowance of a `spender` for an `owner` is set by a call to {approve}. `value` is the new allowance.

ConfidentialTransfer(address,address,byt.details: Emitted when a confidential transfer is made from `from` to `to` of encrypted amount `amount`.

OperatorSet(address,address,uint48).details: Emitted when the expiration timestamp for an operator `operator` is updated for a given `holder`. The operator may move any amount of tokens on behalf of the holder until the timestamp `until`.

Transfer(address,address,uint256).details: Emitted when `value` tokens are moved from one account (`from`) to another (`to`). Note that `value` may be zero.

allowance(address,address).details: Always reverts. Allowances are replaced by time-bound operators.

balanceOf(address).details: Returns an indicator of the underlying encrypted balance. The value is **not** the real balance — it is a counter that starts at `7984.0001` on first interaction and shifts by `0.0001` per send/receive. A return value of `0` means the account has never interacted.

balanceOfIsIndicator().details: Returns `true`, signalling that {balanceOf} returns an indicator, not a real balance.

confidentialBalanceOf(address).details: Returns the confidential balance of the account `account`.

confidentialTotalSupply().details: Returns the confidential total supply of the token.

confidentialTransfer(address,(uint256,ui.details: Transfers the encrypted amount `encryptedAmount` to `to`. Returns the encrypted amount that was actually transferred.

confidentialTransfer(address,bytes32).details: Similar to {confidentialTransfer-address-InEuint64} but without an input proof.  The caller *must* already be allowed by ACL for the given `amount`.

confidentialTransferAndCall(address,(uin.details: Similar to {confidentialTransfer-address-InEuint64} but with a callback to `to` after the transfer. The callback is made to the {IERC7984Receiver-onConfidentialTransferReceived} function on the to address with the actual transferred amount (may differ from the given `encryptedAmount`) and the given data `data`.

confidentialTransferAndCall(address,byte.details: Similar to {confidentialTransfer-address-euint64} but with a callback to `to` after the transfer.

confidentialTransferFrom(address,address.details: Transfers the encrypted amount `encryptedAmount` from `from` to `to`. `msg.sender` must be either `from` or an operator for `from`. Returns the encrypted amount that was actually transferred.
Similar to {confidentialTransferFrom-address-address-InEuint64} but without an input proof. The caller *must* be already allowed by ACL for the given `amount`.

confidentialTransferFromAndCall(address,.details: Similar to {confidentialTransferFrom-address-address-InEuint64} but with a callback to `to` after the transfer.
Similar to {confidentialTransferFrom-address-address-euint64} but with a callback to `to` after the transfer.

contractURI().details: Returns the contract URI. See https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7572[ERC-7572] for details.

decimals().details: Returns the number of decimals of the token. Recommended to be 6.

discloseEncryptedAmount(bytes32,uint64,b.details: Publicly discloses an encrypted value with a given decryption proof. Emits the {AmountDisclosed} event. NOTE: May not be tied to a prior request via {requestDiscloseEncryptedAmount}.

indicatorTick().details: Returns the raw unit size of a single indicator tick (scales with {decimals}).

isOperator(address,address).details: Returns true if `spender` is currently an operator for `holder`.

name().details: Returns the name of the token.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

requestDiscloseEncryptedAmount(bytes32).details: Starts the process to disclose an encrypted amount `encryptedAmount` publicly by making it publicly decryptable. Emits the {AmountDiscloseRequested} event. NOTE: Both `msg.sender` and `address(this)` must have permission to access the encrypted amount `encryptedAmount` to request disclosure of the encrypted amount `encryptedAmount`.

resetIndicatedBalance().details: Resets the caller's indicated balance to `0` (no interaction).

setOperator(address,uint48).details: Sets `operator` as an operator for `holder` until the timestamp `until`. NOTE: An operator may transfer any amount of tokens on behalf of a holder while approved.

supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

symbol().details: Returns the symbol of the token.

totalSupply().details: Returns an indicator of the underlying encrypted total supply. The value is **not** the real total supply — it is a counter that starts at `7984.0000` on first mint and shifts by `0.0001` per mint/burn.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.
